events.event_description: Nonresident ambassadorial relations established when the first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, Milan D Bish (resident in Bridgetown, Barbados), presented credentials to Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.

evidence.quote: Milan D Bish, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1981-11-23. Credentials presented: 1981-12-11. Left Bridgetown 1984-03-04. Note: Also Special Representative to St. Christopher and Nevis.
